title: 11 Herbal Creams for Musicians to Relieve Jaw Pain
description: Salvia officinalis creams may help with jaw pain due to its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. The main constituents of Salvia officinalis, such as rosmarinic acid and caffeic acid, have been shown to reduce inflammation and ease pain. When applied topically as a cream, these compounds can penetrate deep into the skin and reach the affected area, providing localized relief from jaw pain.
